sections.title: With Raw sunlight antelope in inventory

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Oh, is that sunlight antelope meat you're carrying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes... Why?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Come closer, I have a request to make.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Oh, is that sunlight antelope meat you're carrying?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes... Why?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Come closer, I have a request to make.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Sitting up here under the looming threat of death at the jaws of a giant beast that tunnels beneath our very feet got me thinking.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Could we combine the sweet stickiness of redberries with the strong, gamey flavour of sunlight antelope?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Don't get me wrong, Marla is cooking up some wonderful stuff considering the circumstances. I just need something a little more adventurous, you know?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm sure she'd be happy to experiment if you bring her some raw sunlight antelope and redberries!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I can help out.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Wonderful, thank you! I can't wait to try this!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm a bit busy right now.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Aren't we all? Ah well, maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hello! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Protecting the camp from wildlife and thieves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the giant monster up there?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hah! Why would I rush up there when you foolish humans are more than willing to throw yourself into its jaws?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Besides, someone needs to keep an eye on the happenings down here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose that's fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you want me to get you?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'd like to try redberries combined with sunlight antelope! Marla the chef will prepare it if you take her the raw ingredients.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Okay, bye!

sections.title: With Redberry antelope in the inventory

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Oh wow, it smells amazing!

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: ...Mmmhhmm...

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: ...Mmm.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Well, it's... interesting and complex. Definitely an experience.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Thank you... err...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [Player name].

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Thank you, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, usually there's a reward for doing this sort of thing.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Seriously, human? You couldn't just do this out of kindness? For the enjoyment of the journey and the feeling of helping another?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: You weren't helping me out of appreciation for my work here and the service I provide?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Or, at the least, to push the boundaries of culinary achievement?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I... uh... of course. Enjoy your meal.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: I suppose you can have a bite if you like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll pass, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I try some?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Oh. Yeah, I suppose so.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Interesting and complex is a good way to describe it...

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: An experience!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enjoy your meal.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Oh, thank you! Have a great day!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Viero!

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Hello, [player name]! What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Protecting the camp from wildlife and thieves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the giant monster up there?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Hah! Why would I rush up there when you foolish humans are more than willing to throw yourself into its jaws?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Besides, someone needs to keep an eye on the happenings down here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose that's fair.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Seriously though, [player name], do be careful up there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like any more redberry antelope?

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: You know, I think I've had enough. Thanks, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Okay, bye!

sections.title: Using a redberry antelope or raw sunlight antelope on Viero after giving him one

lines.speaker: Viero
lines.text: Oh, more antelope. You know, I think I've had enough. Thanks, though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hello, human. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Protecting the camp from wildlife and thieves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the giant monster up there?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hah! Why would I rush up there when you foolish humans are more than willing to throw yourself into its jaws?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Besides, someone needs to keep an eye on the happenings down here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose that's fair.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: It is hungry work though, and we don't have the most interesting supplies up here.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Got me thinking about those sunlight antelope. Quite an interesting flavour, but I think we can do even more...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Anyway, I shouldn't really be talking to you. Move along, please.
